responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix Samsung Android chat keyboard failure on `chat.ivxholding.com/home` (keyboard does not open when tapping composer), deploy fix to production, and complete Expo Go repair verification on owner device

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; convert to local only for display
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically — manual email + password required on every launch
- App colors must match landing page — `#FFD700` gold, `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork dependencies
- Birthday field REQUIRED (MM/DD/YYYY, age 18-120, stored as `dateOfBirth` ISO YYYY-MM-DD)
- Gender field REQUIRED — chip selector: Male / Female / Prefer not to say
- Landing QA: do not mark production ready because routes return 200; require live evidence
- Expo Go: do not create new project, do not run create-expo-app, do not remove production modules
- CORS must allow only: `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, approved local dev origins
- GitHub pushes require orphan branch technique to exclude `.rork/history/` files with secrets
- Do not reuse previous `exp.direct` tunnel URLs — must generate new URL after invalidation
- Do not say manifest 200 is sufficient — must verify bundle + assets + content types
- Use `bunx` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Samsung keyboard fix must use `visualViewport` API, `touch-action: manipulation`, `user-select: text`, `100dvh`/`100svh` viewport units

## Progress
### Done
- **Owner auto-login removal FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**: Commits `c67f8a2`, `e831c8d`, `e936eef`; 3 auto-login paths blocked in `auth-context.tsx`
- **Owner sign-in fix FULLY DEPLOYED — USER CONFIRMED WORKING**: Commit `d6dbfce` → GitHub `43be880c`
- **App color alignment DEPLOYED**: 784 hardcoded colors replaced across 104 Expo files
- **Enterprise Time Zone System DEPLOYED**: 69/69 tests pass, 17/17 API endpoints verified, 8 cities + DST verified
- **Reels card redesigned DEPLOYED**: commit `730aa4d`
- **Chat UX fixes DEPLOYED AND E2E VERIFIED**: commit `c0470a3`, 5/5 messages OK
- **IVX Registration Redesign DEPLOYED**: `IVXAuthCard.tsx` (~1900 lines), `expo/app/auth.tsx`
- **Birthday field DEPLOYED**: Backend validation 4/4 scenarios pass
- **Gender field DEPLOYED**: `GENDER_OPTIONS` chip selector, `VALID_GENDERS` Set in backend
- **Landing page 20-section QA completed — fixes deployed and verified**
- **Final closeout commit `3abaa17` DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED LIVE on Render**:
  - Backend SHA `3abaa17f` matches GitHub `3abaa17` (boot `2026-07-13T01:07:23.342Z`)
  - CORS: `access-control-allow-origin: https://ivxholding.com` (not `*`) — verified live
  - All routes 200: `/health`, `/api/ivx/properties/featured`, `/api/ivx/jv-deals`, `/api/landing-config`, `/api/ivx/analytics`
  - Protected routes: `/api/ivx/members` without auth → 401; Rate limiting: 5→401, 6th→429
  - Signup E2E: `userId=e39c1586-5560-4887-b707-f9512afa2a83` created successfully
- **Expo Go repair Steps 1-9 COMPLETED (server-side)**:
  - Root cause was stale/dead tunnel URL — Metro had been killed but phone kept trying old URL
  - Manifest "returns HTML" was a TESTING ERROR — missing `expo-platform: android` header in curl test; with correct Expo Go headers, manifest returns `application/expo+json` (3080 bytes, valid JSON)
  - `web.output: 'single'` was removed from `app.config.ts` (unnecessary for dev, but not the root cause)
  - New tunnel `exp://k9xajm4-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` LIVE and verified: manifest 200 JSON, bundle 200 (37.6MB), 5/5 stability checks passed
  - Metro PID 40521 alive, bundle downloads in ~2s through HTTPS tunnel
  - Manifest assets array is empty (assets embedded in bundle) — 404s on icon.png etc. are irrelevant
  - Owner phone cleanup instructions provided (Step 9): update Expo Go, clear cache, disable VPN/Private DNS, scan new QR
  - Deferred owner AI watchdog, incident capture, text-node-guard from startup to 3s after boot in `app/_layout.tsx`
- **Samsung chat keyboard fix CODE COMPLETE, COMMITTED, PUSHED**:
  - Root cause: GestureHandlerRootView intercepts touch events on Samsung Internet preventing TextInput focus; no VisualViewport API for keyboard detection; no web CSS for touch-action/user-select
  - Created `expo/hooks/useWebKeyboard.ts` (NEW): `useWebKeyboard()` hook with VisualViewport API (resize+scroll events, keyboard height calc), `injectWebKeyboardCSS()` (global CSS for touch-action, user-select, dvh/svh, safe-area), `scrollInputIntoView()` (scrolls input above keyboard using rAF + visualViewport)
  - Modified `app/_layout.tsx`: inject CSS at root, GestureHandlerRootView `touchAction: 'auto'` on web
  - Modified `InvestorSupportChat.tsx`: inputRef, `useWebKeyboard` for padding, `scrollInputIntoView` on focus, web CSS (`touchAction: 'manipulation'`, `userSelect: 'text'`) on input style
  - Modified `app/chat-hub.tsx`: composerInputRef, web keyboard padding on KeyboardAvoidingView, scrollIntoView on focus, web CSS on composerInput style
  - Modified `src/modules/chat/components/Composer.tsx`: `useWebKeyboard` for container padding, scrollIntoView on focus, web CSS on input style
  - Modified `app/ivx/chat.tsx`: `useWebKeyboard`, `scrollInputIntoView` on focus, web CSS on composerInput style
  - TypeScript passes with zero errors (`bunx tsc --noEmit`)
  - Committed as `4573329` on `deploy-final-closeout`, pushed to GitHub as SHA `8ce4706` via orphan branch technique
  - Backend `api.ivxholding.com/health` returns 200; `chat.ivxholding.com` returns 200 (Expo web export with `expo-reset` styles)

### In Progress
- **Chat keyboard fix deployment verification**: `chat.ivxholding.com` last-modified `2026-07-13T01:08:31 UTC` — may be stale, needs confirmation that Render auto-deploy picked up SHA `8ce4706` and rebuilt web export
- **Samsung real device keyboard test**: need to verify keyboard opens on Samsung Internet at `chat.ivxholding.com/home` after deploy completes
- **Expo Go device verification (Steps 10-13)**: waiting for owner to scan new QR code `exp://k9xajm4-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` on updated Expo Go

### Blocked
- **www.ivxholding.com does not 301 redirect to ivxholding.com** — requires Cloudflare DNS/page rule change
- **404 returns 200 on ivxholding.com** — S3 SPA fallback serves index.html for all paths; requires CloudFront Lambda edge function
- **Landing HTML not redeployed to S3** — AWS credentials not available in cloud sandbox (`AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID` not set)
- **Device QA (Android, iPhone, desktop) NOT VERIFIED** — requires physical devices
- **Media QA (play/pause/mute/swipe/like/comment) NOT VERIFIED** — requires real device
- **CSP HTTP header not applied on S3** — S3 serves static HTML without security headers
- **Bundle size 37.6MB not reducible below 15MB** — Expo Go uses dev mode; SDK 54 core + RN 0.81 + React 19 + 242 routes = ~37MB minimum
- **Render API credentials not in env** — cannot manually trigger Render deploy; relying on auto-deploy from GitHub push

## Key Decisions
- CORS allowlist: `IVX_ALLOWED_ORIGINS` array in `hono.ts` with `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://www.ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, `http://localhost:8081/3000/5173`, `http://127.0.0.1:8081/3000` — Hono `cors()` origin function returns `null` for non-allowlisted origins
- All 32 backend API files had `'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'` replaced with `'https://ivxholding.com'` via `sed` batch fix
- Owner recovery auth: checks `readBearerToken(request)` against `process.env.IVX_OWNER_TOKEN` — returns 401 if missing/mismatched
- Fake watchman binary (`/tmp/fake-bin/watchman`) returns synthetic JSON for `get-sockname`, `watch-project`, `version` commands — unblocks Metro cold builds in cloud sandbox with `nice_value=19`
- Orphan branch push technique: `git checkout --orphan` → `git rm -rf --cached .` → `git add` specific dirs → `git commit` → `git push github HEAD:main --force`
- Deferred owner AI modules from startup: `setTimeout(() => { require(...) }, 3000)` in `_layout.tsx` useEffect — prevents 213KB+ owner-only code from blocking initial bundle
- Expo Go manifest "HTML not JSON" was a TESTING ERROR — must include `expo-platform: android` + `Accept: application/expo+json` headers; Expo CLI `ManifestMiddleware.checkBrowserRequestAsync()` serves HTML only when no `expo-platform` header present
- Samsung keyboard fix: `useWebKeyboard` hook uses `window.visualViewport` resize/scroll events with 80px threshold to detect keyboard; `injectWebKeyboardCSS()` injects global `<style id="ivx-web-keyboard-fix">` with `touch-action: manipulation`, `user-select: text`, `100dvh`/`100svh`, `env(safe-area-inset-bottom)`
- Web-only CSS properties on TextInput styles use `...(Platform.OS === 'web' ? ({ touchAction: 'manipulation', userSelect: 'text', WebkitUserSelect: 'text', outlineStyle: 'none' } as any) : {})` pattern
- `scrollInputIntoView` accesses React Native TextInput's internal DOM ref via `(inputRef.current as unknown as { _inputRef?: { current?: HTMLElement } })?._inputRef?.current`

## Next Steps
- Verify `chat.ivxholding.com` has been redeployed with SHA `8ce4706` (check last-modified header change, or wait for Render build to complete)
- Verify keyboard fix is live: curl `chat.ivxholding.com` and check for `ivx-web-keyboard-fix` style injection in served HTML
- Test keyboard behavior on Samsung Internet real device at `chat.ivxholding.com/home`
- Test keyboard on Android Chrome at `chat.ivxholding.com/home`
- Run chat tests and verify send flow (type → send → message appears → re-focus → type again)
- Test all chat entry routes: `/home`, `/chat`, `/chat-hub`, `/ivx/chat`
- If tunnel still needed: verify owner scans `exp://k9xajm4-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` on updated Expo Go
- If tunnel fails twice: build Android development APK via EAS (Step 13)
- Redeploy landing HTML to S3 (requires AWS credentials)
- Verify `www.ivxholding.com` 301 redirect (requires Cloudflare DNS change)

## Critical Context
- Backend deployed and verified: SHA `3abaa17f`, boot `2026-07-13T01:07:23.342Z` — all fixes live
- Git branch: `deploy-final-closeout`, local SHA `4573329` (keyboard fix commit)
- GitHub main: SHA `8ce4706` (orphan branch push of keyboard fix)
- Live tunnel: `exp://k9xajm4-anonymous-8081.exp.direct` (Metro PID 40521, port 8081, `.expo/settings.json` randomness `K9XAjM4`)
- All previous tunnel URLs are DEAD (`9gmyh1o`, `jyiupoq`, `eb3lc6s`) — must not be reused
- `chat.ivxholding.com` serves Expo web export (HTML with `expo-reset` styles, react-native-web, `#root` element)
- `chat.ivxholding.com` last-modified `2026-07-13T01:08:31 UTC` — may not yet reflect keyboard fix deploy
- Render auto-deploys on push to main per `render.yaml` (`autoDeployTrigger: commit`)
- Expo SDK 54.0.35, CLI 54.0.25, expo-router 6.0.24, React 19.1.0, RN 0.81.5
- 242 route files, 130 heavy admin/owner/developer routes, 3,184 total import statements
- Chat composer implementations exist in 5 locations: `InvestorSupportChat.tsx`, `chat-hub.tsx`, `Composer.tsx`, `app/ivx/chat.tsx`, `ChatScreen.tsx` — all but ChatScreen.tsx have been fixed with web keyboard support
- `render.yaml` Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` (from `scripts/trigger-render-deploy.mjs`)
- `backend/express-chat-server.ts` serves Socket.IO chat backend on port 3000, `CHAT_FRONTEND_URL = https://chat.ivxholding.com`

## Relevant Files
- `expo/hooks/useWebKeyboard.ts` (NEW): VisualViewport API hook, `injectWebKeyboardCSS()`, `scrollInputIntoView()` — Samsung keyboard detection and CSS injection
- `expo/app/_layout.tsx`: Root layout — injects `injectWebKeyboardCSS()`, GestureHandlerRootView with `touchAction: 'auto'` on web, 5 startup providers, owner AI modules deferred to 3s
- `expo/components/InvestorSupportChat.tsx`: Chat composer for `(tabs)/chat.tsx` — inputRef, `useWebKeyboard` padding, `
